content.text:
<user_message>
Here's a concise but powerful prompt you can paste into Replit AI:

```text
Build a modern, responsive Online Examination Management System (OEMS) using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js (Express), and MySQL (or SQLite for development). Use my existing HTML exam interface as the Student Exam Module. The system must have four user roles: Admin, Lecturer/Tutor, Student, and Super Admin.

Features:
- Secure login and role-based authentication
- Admin dashboard to manage users, departments, courses, and classes
- Lecturer dashboard to create courses, exams, question banks, and view analytics
- Student dashboard to view enrolled courses, available exams, results, and exam history
- Question builder supporting MCQ, True/False, Fill in the Blank, Essay, Matching, and Code
```

</user_message>

I'm building a full-stack Online Examination Management System with four user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Lecturer, Student), a rich question bank, exam engine, analytics, and role-based dashboards — all backed by a PostgreSQL database and Express API.

Let me start by creating the frontend artifact and writing the API spec in parallel.
Now I'll write the OpenAPI spec — the critical path to codegen and frontend.

arguments.content:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Api
  version: 0.1.0
  description: Online Examination Management System API
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Base API path
tags:
  - name: health
    description: Health operations
  - name: auth
    description: Authentication
  - name: users
    description: User management
  - name: departments
    description: Department management
  - name: courses
    description: Course management
  - name: classes
    description: Class/section management
  - name: questions
    description: Question bank
  - name: exams
    description: Exam management
  - name: enrollments
    description: Enrollment management
  - name: attempts
    description: Exam attempts
  - name: results
    description: Results and grades
  - name: analytics
    description: Analytics and statistics

paths:
  /healthz:
    get:
      operationId: healthCheck
      tags: [health]
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthStatus"

  # AUTH
  /auth/login:
    post:
      operationId: login
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Login
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/LoginInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuthResponse"
        "401":
          description: Invalid credentials

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      operationId: logout
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Logout
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Logged out

  /auth/me:
    get:
      operationId: getMe
      tags: [auth]
      summary: Get current user
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        "401":
          description: Unauthorized

  # USERS
  /users:
    get:
      operationId: listUsers
      tags: [users]
      summary: List all users
      parameters:
        - name: role
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: departmentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of users
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
    post:
      operationId: createUser
      tags: [users]
      summary: Create a user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"

  /users/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getUser
      tags: [users]
      summary: Get user by ID
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
    patch:
      operationId: updateUser
      tags: [users]
      summary: Update user
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UserUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteUser
      tags: [users]
      summary: Delete user
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # DEPARTMENTS
  /departments:
    get:
      operationId: listDepartments
      tags: [departments]
      summary: List departments
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of departments
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Department"
    post:
      operationId: createDepartment
      tags: [departments]
      summary: Create department
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DepartmentInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Department"

  /departments/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateDepartment
      tags: [departments]
      summary: Update department
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DepartmentUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Department"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteDepartment
      tags: [departments]
      summary: Delete department
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # COURSES
  /courses:
    get:
      operationId: listCourses
      tags: [courses]
      summary: List courses
      parameters:
        - name: departmentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of courses
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Course"
    post:
      operationId: createCourse
      tags: [courses]
      summary: Create course
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CourseInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Course"

  /courses/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getCourse
      tags: [courses]
      summary: Get course by ID
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Course
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Course"
    patch:
      operationId: updateCourse
      tags: [courses]
      summary: Update course
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CourseUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Course"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteCourse
      tags: [courses]
      summary: Delete course
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # CLASSES
  /classes:
    get:
      operationId: listClasses
      tags: [classes]
      summary: List classes
      parameters:
        - name: courseId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of classes
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Class"
    post:
      operationId: createClass
      tags: [classes]
      summary: Create class
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ClassInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Class"

  /classes/{id}:
    patch:
      operationId: updateClass
      tags: [classes]
      summary: Update class
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ClassUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Class"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteClass
      tags: [classes]
      summary: Delete class
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # QUESTIONS
  /questions:
    get:
      operationId: listQuestions
      tags: [questions]
      summary: List questions
      parameters:
        - name: courseId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of questions
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Question"
    post:
      operationId: createQuestion
      tags: [questions]
      summary: Create question
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/QuestionInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Question"

  /questions/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getQuestion
      tags: [questions]
      summary: Get question
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Question
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Question"
    patch:
      operationId: updateQuestion
      tags: [questions]
      summary: Update question
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/QuestionUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Question"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteQuestion
      tags: [questions]
      summary: Delete question
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  # EXAMS
  /exams:
    get:
      operationId: listExams
      tags: [exams]
      summary: List exams
      parameters:
        - name: courseId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["string", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of exams
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exam"
    post:
      operationId: createExam
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Create exam
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExamInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exam"

  /exams/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getExam
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Get exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Exam with questions
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExamDetail"
    patch:
      operationId: updateExam
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Update exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExamUpdate"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exam"
    delete:
      operationId: deleteExam
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Delete exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted

  /exams/{id}/questions:
    post:
      operationId: addExamQuestion
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Add question to exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExamQuestionInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Question added

  /exams/{id}/questions/{questionId}:
    delete:
      operationId: removeExamQuestion
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Remove question from exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: questionId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Removed

  /exams/{id}/publish:
    post:
      operationId: publishExam
      tags: [exams]
      summary: Publish exam
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Published
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Exam"

  # ENROLLMENTS
  /enrollments:
    get:
      operationId: listEnrollments
      tags: [enrollments]
      summary: List enrollments
      parameters:
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: courseId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of enrollments
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Enrollment"
    post:
      operationId: createEnrollment
      tags: [enrollments]
      summary: Enroll student in course
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/EnrollmentInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Enrolled
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Enrollment"

  /enrollments/{id}:
    delete:
      operationId: deleteEnrollment
      tags: [enrollments]
      summary: Remove enrollment
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Removed

  # ATTEMPTS
  /attempts:
    get:
      operationId: listAttempts
      tags: [attempts]
      summary: List exam attempts
      parameters:
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: examId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of attempts
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Attempt"
    post:
      operationId: startAttempt
      tags: [attempts]
      summary: Start exam attempt
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttemptInput"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Attempt started
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttemptDetail"

  /attempts/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getAttempt
      tags: [attempts]
      summary: Get attempt with questions
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Attempt detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttemptDetail"

  /attempts/{id}/answer:
    post:
      operationId: submitAnswer
      tags: [attempts]
      summary: Submit answer for a question
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnswerInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Answer saved

  /attempts/{id}/submit:
    post:
      operationId: submitAttempt
      tags: [attempts]
      summary: Submit exam (finish attempt)
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Attempt submitted
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Result"

  # RESULTS
  /results:
    get:
      operationId: listResults
      tags: [results]
      summary: List results
      parameters:
        - name: studentId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
        - name: examId
          in: query
          schema:
            type: ["integer", "null"]
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of results
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Result"

  /results/{id}:
    get:
      operationId: getResult
      tags: [results]
      summary: Get detailed result
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Result detail
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResultDetail"

  /results/{id}/grade:
    patch:
      operationId: gradeResult
      tags: [results]
      summary: Grade essay/manual questions
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/GradeInput"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Graded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Result"

  # ANALYTICS
  /analytics/overview:
    get:
      operationId: getAnalyticsOverview
      tags: [analytics]
      summary: Platform-wide overview stats
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Overview statistics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/AnalyticsOverview"

  /analytics/exams/{examId}:
    get:
      operationId: getExamAnalytics
      tags: [analytics]
      summary: Exam-level analytics
      parameters:
        - name: examId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Exam analytics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExamAnalytics"

  /analytics/students/{studentId}:
    get:
      operationId: getStudentAnalytics
      tags: [analytics]
      summary: Student performance analytics
      parameters:
        - name: studentId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Student analytics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/StudentAnalytics"

  /analytics/lecturer/{lecturerId}:
    get:
      operationId: getLecturerAnalytics
      tags: [analytics]
      summary: Lecturer dashboard analytics
      parameters:
        - name: lecturerId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Lecturer analytics
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/LecturerAnalytics"

components:
  schemas:
    HealthStatus:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
      required:
        - status

    # AUTH
    LoginInput:
      type: object
      required: [email, password]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
        password:
          type: string

    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [user, token]
      properties:
        user:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        token:
          type: string

    # USER
    User:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, email, role, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [super_admin, admin, lecturer, student]
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        departmentName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        studentId:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean
        createdAt:
          type: string

    UserInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, email, password, role]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        password:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [super_admin, admin, lecturer, student]
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        studentId:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    UserUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [super_admin, admin, lecturer, student]
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        isActive:
          type: boolean
        studentId:
          type: ["string", "null"]

    # DEPARTMENT
    Department:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        description:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        userCount:
          type: integer
        courseCount:
          type: integer
        createdAt:
          type: string

    DepartmentInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string

    DepartmentUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string

    # COURSE
    Course:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, code, createdAt]
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
        description:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        departmentName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        lecturerId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        lecturerName:
          type: ["string", "null"]
        enrollmentCount:
          type: integer
        examCount:
          type: integer
        createdAt:
          type: string

    CourseInput:
      type: object
      required: [name, code]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]
        lecturerId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]

    CourseUpdate:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        departmentId:
          type: ["integer", "null"]

    task: `Build the full frontend for an Online Examination Management System (OEMS) — a serious academic platform used daily by university staff and students. It should feel precise, authoritative, and trustworthy — like a well-built government or university portal, but without looking like it was designed in 2010. Dense with information, organized, and fast to navigate. Make a bold, deliberate color choice — perhaps deep indigo or navy with amber accents — something that reads as institutional but distinctive. Do not use emojis anywhere in the UI.

**Product identity:** A multi-role exam platform for universities. Four roles log into different dashboards and see only what they need. Super Admins run the platform, Admins manage the institution, Lecturers build and run exams, Students take them.

**Authentication:** The app starts at /login. After login, the current user (from useGetMe) is stored in a React context (AuthContext) and used to gate role-based routing. Store the JWT token from login in localStorage and attach it as a Bearer token on every fetch request via the custom fetch in lib/api-client-react/src/custom-fetch.ts (update the file to read from localStorage).

**Pages and routes:**

- /login — Secure login form. Email + password. Role-based redirect after login.
- /dashboard — Role-aware home: redirects to the appropriate dashboard based on role.
- /super-admin — Super Admin overview: platform health, all users across all departments, system stats. Uses useGetAnalyticsOverview.
- /admin — Admin dashboard: manage users, departments, courses, classes. Tabs for each entity.
  - Users tab: useListUsers, useCreateUser, useUpdateUser, useDeleteUser with role filter
  - Departments tab: useListDepartments, useCreateDepartment, useUpdateDepartment, useDeleteDepartment
  - Courses tab: useListCourses, useCreateCourse, useUpdateCourse, useDeleteCourse
  - Classes tab: useListClasses, useCreateClass, useUpdateClass, useDeleteClass
- /lecturer — Lecturer dashboard: my courses, exam builder, question bank, analytics. Uses useGetLecturerAnalytics (pass current user id).
  - My Courses: useListCourses filtered by lecturer
  - Exams: useListExams, useCreateExam, useUpdateExam, useDeleteExam, usePublishExam
  - Exam Builder: useGetExam, useListQuestions, useAddExamQuestion, useRemoveExamQuestion
  - Question Bank: useListQuestions, useCreateQuestion, useUpdateQuestion, useDeleteQuestion — supports question types: mcq, true_false, fill_blank, essay, matching, code
  - Analytics: useGetExamAnalytics per exam
- /student — Student dashboard: my enrolled courses, available exams, exam taking, results history. Uses useGetStudentAnalytics.
  - My Courses: useListEnrollments with studentId
  - Available Exams: useListExams showing published exams for enrolled courses
  - Take Exam: useGetAttempt, useSubmitAnswer (save each answer), useSubmitAttempt — full exam UI with timer countdown, question navigation, answer saving
  - Results: useListResults, useGetResult for detailed breakdown
- /exam/:attemptId — Full-screen exam taking experience. Timer in top-right. Question navigation sidebar. Answer submission. Shows different question types appropriately (MCQ options, True/False toggle, text area for essay, code editor for code questions). On submit, navigates to result page.
- /results/:resultId — Detailed result view: score, pass/fail badge, per-question breakdown with correct answers shown if showResults is true.

**Data types:**
- User: id, name, email, role (super_admin|admin|lecturer|student), departmentId, departmentName, studentId, isActive
- Department: id, name, code, description, userCount, courseCount
- Course: id, name, code, description, departmentId, departmentName, lecturerId, lecturerName, enrollmentCount, examCount
- Class: id, name, courseId, courseName, academicYear, semester, studentCount
- Question: id, text, type, courseId, points, difficulty, options[], correctAnswer, explanation, codeLanguage
- Exam: id, title, description, courseId, status (draft|published|active|closed), durationMinutes, totalPoints, passingScore, startTime, endTime, shuffleQuestions, showResults, questionCount, attemptCount
- Result: id, attemptId, studentId, examId, score, totalPoints, percentage, isPassed, gradingStatus, answers[]
- AnalyticsOverview: totalStudents, totalLecturers, totalCourses, totalExams, activeExams, totalAttempts, averageScore, passRate, recentActivity[], examsByStatus[], scoreDistribution[]

**Available API hooks (import from @workspace/api-client-react):**
- useLogin, useLogout, useGetMe
- useListUsers(params?, options?), useCreateUser, useUpdateUser, useDeleteUser
- useGetUser(id, options?), getGetUserQueryKey(id)
- useListDepartments(options?), useCreateDepartment, useUpdateDepartment, useDeleteDepartment
- getListDepartmentsQueryKey()
- useListCourses(params?, options?), useCreateCourse, useUpdateCourse, useDeleteCourse
- useGetCourse(id, options?), getGetCourseQueryKey(id)
- getListCoursesQueryKey(params?)
- useListClasses(params?, options?), useCreateClass, useUpdateClass, useDeleteClass
- getListClassesQueryKey(params?)
- useListQuestions(params?, options?), useCreateQuestion, useUpdateQuestion, useDeleteQuestion
- getGetQuestionQueryKey(id), getListQuestionsQueryKey(params?)
- useListExams(params?, options?), useCreateExam, useUpdateExam, useDeleteExam
- useGetExam(id, options?), getGetExamQueryKey(id), getListExamsQueryKey(params?)
- useAddExamQuestion, useRemoveExamQuestion, usePublishExam
- useListEnrollments(params?, options?), useCreateEnrollment, useDeleteEnrollment
- getListEnrollmentsQueryKey(params?)
- useListAttempts(params?, options?), useStartAttempt, useGetAttempt(id, options?)
- useSubmitAnswer, useSubmitAttempt, getGetAttemptQueryKey(id)
- useListResults(params?, options?), useGetResult(id, options?), useGradeResult
- getListResultsQueryKey(params?), getGetResultQueryKey(id)
- useGetAnalyticsOverview(options?), getGetAnalyticsOverviewQueryKey()
- useGetExamAnalytics(examId, options?), getGetExamAnalyticsQueryKey(examId)
- useGetStudentAnalytics(studentId, options?), getGetStudentAnalyticsQueryKey(studentId)
- useGetLecturerAnalytics(lecturerId, options?), getGetLecturerAnalyticsQueryKey(lecturerId)

**Hook usage rules:**

Use ALL the provided hooks to build a fully working app with real data calls. The product surface is defined — express it beautifully. Prioritize clarity, density, and professional polish. Smooth transitions between pages. Thoughtful micro-interactions.`,

     1→# API Server
     2→
     3→We maintain a single API server in this monorepo built with Express 5 and Node. It implements the OpenAPI contract.
     4→
     5→## Runtime File Paths
     6→
     7→Server code is bundled by esbuild and runs from `dist/`, so `__dirname` and `import.meta.url` point at bundled output, not the source tree. Resolve runtime file paths from an explicit root, not relative to the module.
     8→
     9→For files that belong to the API server artifact, normalize to the workspace root first so development and production resolve the same location:
    10→
    11→```typescript
    12→const workspaceRoot = process.cwd().endsWith(path.join("artifacts", "api-server"))
    13→  ? path.resolve(process.cwd(), "../..")
    14→  : process.cwd();
    15→
    16→const uploadsDir = path.resolve(workspaceRoot, "artifacts/api-server/uploads");
    17→const dataDir = path.resolve(workspaceRoot, "artifacts/api-server/data");
    18→```
    19→
    20→This keeps paths stable when development commands run from `artifacts/api-server` and production commands run from the workspace root.
    21→
    22→## Logging
    23→
    24→The API server uses **pino** for structured JSON logging. All server-side code must use the shared logger instead of `console.log` or `console.error`.
    25→
    26→> **Note:** Older workspaces created before the structured-logging stack update may not have `pino-http` in `app.ts` or `src/lib/logger.ts`. Before following the guidance below, check whether `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/logger.ts` exists and `app.ts` mounts `pinoHttp(...)`. If they are missing, install `pino` and `pino-http` as dependencies and `pino-pretty` as a devDependency, create `src/lib/logger.ts` with the canonical content below, and add the canonical `pinoHttp` middleware in `app.ts` before the routes (see the **Canonical pino-http middleware** section below for the full snippet — do not use a bare `pinoHttp({ logger })` call, as the custom serializers are required to strip query strings and prevent sensitive data from leaking into logs). Also replace any existing `console.log` and `console.error` calls in server code (e.g. `index.ts`, route files) with the appropriate `logger` or `req.log` calls so all output is structured JSON.
    27→
    28→Canonical `artifacts/api-server/src/lib/logger.ts`:
    29→
    30→```typescript
    31→import pino from "pino";
    32→
    33→const isProduction = process.env.NODE_ENV === "production";
    34→
    35→export const logger = pino({
    36→  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL ?? "info",
    37→  redact: [
    38→    "req.headers.authorization",
    39→    "req.headers.cookie",
    40→    "res.headers['set-cookie']",
    41→  ],
    42→  ...(isProduction
    43→    ? {}
    44→    : {
    45→        transport: {
    46→          target: "pino-pretty",
    47→          options: { colorize: true },
    48→        },
    49→      }),
    50→});
    51→```
    52→
    53→Import the logger (adjust the relative path based on file depth):
    54→
    55→```typescript
    56→// From src/index.ts:
    57→import { logger } from "./lib/logger";
    58→
    59→// From src/routes/*.ts or src/middlewares/*.ts:
    60→import { logger } from "../lib/logger";
    61→
    62→// From nested route directories like src/routes/todos/index.ts:
    63→import { logger } from "../../lib/logger";
    64→```
    65→
    66→### Canonical pino-http middleware
    67→
    68→Add the following `pinoHttp` middleware in `app.ts` **before** any routes. The custom serializers strip query strings from logged URLs (preventing sensitive parameters like OIDC callback codes from leaking) and limit response logging to the status code:
    69→
    70→```typescript
    71→import pinoHttp from "pino-http";
    72→import { logger } from "./lib/logger";
    73→
    74→app.use(
    75→  pinoHttp({
    76→    logger,
    77→    serializers: {
    78→      req(req) {
    79→        return {
    80→          id: req.id,
    81→          method: req.method,
    82→          url: req.url?.split("?")[0],
    83→        };
    84→      },
    85→      res(res) {
    86→        return {
    87→          statusCode: res.statusCode,
    88→        };
    89→      },
    90→    },
    91→  }),
    92→);
    93→```

---
name: OEMS Auth Pattern
description: How JWT auth works in OEMS — token storage, customFetch export, and the auth guard
---

# OEMS Auth Pattern

## Token storage
- localStorage key: `oems_token`
- Set on login, cleared on logout (use-auth.tsx)
- `customFetch` in lib/api-client-react reads it automatically via `_authTokenGetter`

## Critical export issue
`customFetch` must be explicitly exported from `lib/api-client-react/src/index.ts`:
```ts
export { customFetch, setBaseUrl, setAuthTokenGetter } from "./custom-fetch";
```
The generated index only exports `setBaseUrl` and `setAuthTokenGetter` by default — adding `customFetch` was needed for the frontend api.ts helper.

**Why:** The api.ts helper in artifacts/oems/src/lib/api.ts imports `customFetch` directly for non-codegen'd endpoints.

## Password hashing
SHA256(password + "oems_salt") in auth.ts — see hashPassword function.

## Auth guard
ProtectedRoute in App.tsx checks isAuthenticated + allowedRoles array. Unauthenticated requests to protected routes redirect to /login (expected behavior).

---
name: OEMS Frontend Architecture
description: Role-based routing, sub-page structure, and API call pattern for the OEMS React app
---

# OEMS Frontend Architecture

## Route structure
- `/login` — public
- `/dashboard` — auto-redirects by role
- `/super-admin` — super admin only
- `/admin`, `/admin/users`, `/admin/courses`, `/admin/announcements` — admin+super_admin
- `/lecturer`, `/lecturer/exams`, `/lecturer/live`, `/lecturer/materials`, `/lecturer/assignments`, `/lecturer/proctoring` — lecturer only
- `/student`, `/student/exams`, `/student/live`, `/student/materials`, `/student/assignments`, `/student/announcements` — student only

## API call pattern
All non-codegen'd endpoints use `artifacts/oems/src/lib/api.ts`:
```ts
api.get<T>("/path") — GET
api.post<T>("/path", data) — POST
api.put<T>("/path", data) — PUT
api.del("/path") — DELETE
```
These wrap customFetch with `/api` prefix auto-prepended.

## Codegen'd hooks (from OpenAPI spec)
Used for: auth, analytics overview, exams (partial). Generated hooks from @workspace/api-client-react.

## Sidebar navigation
DashboardLayout in components/layout/dashboard-layout.tsx — roleNav object maps role → nav items with href+icon. Each role has its own set of sidebar links matching the route structure.

**Why:** Cleaner than a single nav with role-based visibility — each role only sees their own section.

---
name: OEMS DB Schema
description: Overview of all 13 DB tables and their purposes in OEMS
---

# OEMS DB Schema (13 tables)

## Core tables
- `users` — all roles (super_admin, admin, lecturer, student)
- `departments` — academic departments
- `courses` — courses with code, credits, departmentId
- `classes` — class sections (courseId, lecturerId, academicYear)
- `enrollments` — student ↔ course/class relationships

## Exam engine tables
- `questions` — MCQ, true_false, fill_blank, essay, matching, code
- `exams` — exam metadata with status (draft/active/ended)
- `exam_questions` — join table exam ↔ questions
- `attempts` — student exam attempts (in_progress/submitted/graded)
- `attempt_answers` — per-question answers with auto-grading
- `results` — computed scores and pass/fail

## E-learning tables (added later)
- `proctoring_violations` — violations per attempt (tab_switch, fullscreen_exit, copy_paste, focus_lost, right_click, keyboard_shortcut)
- `live_sessions` — online class sessions (scheduled/live/ended/cancelled)
- `course_materials` — learning resources (video/pdf/link/slide/document/audio)
- `assignments` — student assignments with due dates
- `assignment_submissions` — student answers + grades

## Announcements
- `announcements` — courseId nullable (null = global to all)

**Why isPassed is integer:** Drizzle pgTable uses integer for boolean-like flags in this codebase; API converts to boolean in responses.

|---|---|---|
| 1 | Login — click **"Forgot password?"** next to the password label | Goes to `/forgot-password` |
| 2 | Enter email → **"Get reset code"** | Server generates a 6-digit code, stores it in the DB with a 1-hour expiry, returns it on screen |
| 3 | Code screen shows the code with a **copy button** → **"Continue to reset password"** | Auto-fills the code into the next screen |
| 4 | Enter the 6-digit code + new password + confirm | Server validates the code, checks expiry, updates the password hash, clears the token |
| 5 | ✅ Success screen → **"Sign in"** | Student signs in with their new password |

**Guard rails built in:**
- Code expires after **1 hour** — error shown if used late
- Invalid codes (wrong number) → clear error message with link back to request a new one
- Password must be at least 6 characters
- Token is deleted from DB immediately after use (one-time use)
- The code field only accepts digits, formatted with letter-spacing for easy reading

> In production you'd swap `res.json({ resetCode: code })` for an email call (SendGrid, Resend, etc.) and the code would never appear in the response.

**Root cause:** Both the student and lecturer profile pages used `<FormLabel>` outside of a `<FormField>` wrapper for the read-only email display. The `FormLabel` component internally calls `useFormField()` which requires a React context that only exists inside a `<FormField>` — using it standalone throws the crash.

**Fix:** Replaced the bare `<FormLabel>` / `<FormItem>` wrappers on the email display with a plain `<div>` + `<label>` using the same styling, which needs no context at all.

Both `student/profile.tsx` and `lecturer/profile.tsx` are patched. The app is running cleanly now.
